creator: support@thinserver.net
text:
On reboot invoking startx or /stand/sysiistall causes a fatal crash (restart).
System is a Micron Elan P166,64 Meg, NE2000 as ed0 , S3 trio64 DX. Was running 2.2.7 with no problems. Other than this small glitch, I think 3.4 works great.

How-To-Repeat: Log id as root. startx. open terminal window. invoke /stand/sysinstall.

.....reload os
